---
title: "STEPWISE escenari nul"
author: "Max Ranz de la Iglesia"
date: "2026-03-30"
output: html_document
---

# Stepwise nul

```{r}
setwd("D:/Documentos/TFG/TFG-Selecci-de-variables-en-escenaris-complexos")
load("D:/Documentos/TFG/TFG-Selecci-de-variables-en-escenaris-complexos/dades_escenari_nul_corrAleat.RData")

resultats_sw <- data.frame(
  N           = integer(),
  pi          = numeric(),
  correlation = character(),  
  FP          = numeric(),
  FP_percent  = numeric(),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

compta_vars_step <- function(model) {
  coeficients <- summary(model)$coefficients
  nvar <- nrow(coeficients) - 1
  if (nvar < 0) nvar <- 0
  return(nvar)
}

system.time({
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(comb))) {

    N           <- comb$N[i]
    pi          <- comb$pi[i]
    correlation <- as.character(comb$correlation[i])  

    fp_stepwise <- numeric(iters)

    for (j in 1:iters) {
      cat("Escenari", i, "- Simulació", j,
          "| N =", N, "| pi =", pi, "| corr =", correlation, "\n")

      X_sub <- X[[i]][[j]]
      Y_bin <- Y[[i]][[j]]
      dades <- data.frame(Y = Y_bin, X_sub)

      tryCatch({
        nulmodel  <- glm(Y ~ 1,  data = dades, family = binomial)
        fullmodel <- glm(Y ~ .,  data = dades, family = binomial)

        stepmodel <- step(
          nulmodel,
          scope     = list(lower = nulmodel, upper = fullmodel),
          direction = "both",
          trace     = 0
        )

        fp_stepwise[j] <- compta_vars_step(stepmodel)

      }, error = function(e) {
        cat(sprintf("  [WARN] Escenari %d, sim %d: %s\n", i, j, conditionMessage(e)))
        fp_stepwise[j] <<- 0
      })
    }

    resultats_sw <- rbind(
      resultats_sw,
      data.frame(
        N           = N,
        pi          = pi,
        correlation = correlation,
        FP          = mean(fp_stepwise),
        FP_percent  = mean(fp_stepwise) / num_vars,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
    )
  }
})

print(resultats_sw)
save(resultats_sw, file = "resultats_sw_nul_2.RData")
```
